docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MATHIESON, JOYFUL
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM (SMALL CLAIMS) (HEARING SET FOR JAN-10-2022) (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MATHIESON, JOYFUL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-10-2022 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. (HEARING SET FOR JAN-10-2022 AT 1:30PM)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-10-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-10-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF JOYFUL MATHIESON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DELILA HAILE IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
TRIAL RESET TO JAN-10-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF NOV-05-2021 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $110) SERVED DEC-22-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HAILE, DELILA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MATHIESON, JOYFUL AS TO DEFENDANT HAILE, DELILA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-05-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: EXHIBITS RECD IN MAIL 12/7/22 SUBMITTED BY PLANTIFF

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MATHIESON, JOYFUL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAILE, DELILA $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $185.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,685.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
